text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm about to walk past the academy gates, when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there, Opera O! How many times
have I told you not to cover our room in roses?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I wish you would give more thought toward your
roommate—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hah ha ha! My apologies!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But, alas, an Overlord like myself must radiate
aesthetical grandiosity. Roses are vital, as such!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh, I said wait!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Honestly, she never listens to me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't know how you do that first thing in the
morning. I guess you just can't help it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's just you, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, a cluttered room leads to a deterioration in
quality of life, as well as a decrease in work
efficiency.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was merely stating my opinion in order to
prevent that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Stop, Brian. Your collar appears to be crooked by
roughly 0.5 degrees.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Are you for real?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're part of the student council. You have to
look the part.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I suppose I'll fix it for you this time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, give me a break. What's the point of being
uptight about everything?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It's so dumb.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hey! Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wait, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Quit following me! I don't have time for your
nagging.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gah! She's getting away!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(Her rapid acceleration is leagues above the
average Umamusume!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
(I don't think I can catch up when she goes at full
speed!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: (Urk.. Is giving up my only option?)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, I cannot! I'll lose sleep over Brian's crooked
collar!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What formidable acceleration! Perhaps this is a
signal to work on my own technique!
